name: Prune and Orange Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Dried grated orange rind OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole wheat flour, baking soda, and baking powder in a large bowl. Stir to mix well.
2. Add the dried or fresh orange rind and prune butter to the flour mixture. Stir until the dry ingredients are moistened.
3. If using, stir in the chopped pecans.
4. Coat an 8 x 4-inch loaf pan with non-stick cooking spray.
5. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove the bread from the oven and let it sit for 10 minutes.
8. Invert the loaf onto a wire rack, turn right side up, and cool before slicing and serving.
NUTRITIONAL FACTS (per slice)
Calories: 82
Fat: 0.3g
Protein: 2.4g
Cholesterol: 0mg
Sodium: 73mg
Fiber: 3g
Calcium: 15mg
Potassium: 162mg
Iron: 0.9mg
